zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Knolleys於1416年出生在美國堪薩斯州薩姆納倫敦時，她的父親Thomas Knollys Lord Mayor of London66歲，母親Joan62歲。她於1430年2月15日與John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London在英國米德萊可倫敦結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和10個女兒的父母。她去世於1444年在她的家鄉享年28歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Knolleys于1416年出生在美国堪萨斯州薩姆納倫敦时，她的父亲Thomas Knollys Lord Mayor of London66岁，母亲Joan62岁。她于1430年2月15日与John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London在英国米德萊可倫敦结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和10个女儿的父母。她去世于1444年在她的家乡享年28岁。

nameMeanings.name: Knolleys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Knowles
meanings: English: topographic name from Middle English knol(le) ‘knoll, hilltop’ (Old English cnoll) or from any of the many places (some lost) named with this word, for example Knowle (Devon, Dorset, Lancashire, Somerset, Warwickshire, and Yorkshire) and Knole (Kent, Sussex).
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tnúthghail (see Newell ).
English: variant of Noel , often, with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Knolleys was born in 1416, in London, Sumner, Kansas, United States, her father, Thomas Knollys Lord Mayor of London, was 66 and her mother, Joan, was 62. She married John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London on 15 February 1430, in London, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 10 daughters. She died in 1444, in her hometown, at the age of 28.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Knolleys est née en 1416, à London, Sumner, Kansas, États-Unis, son père, Thomas Knollys Lord Mayor of London, avait 66 ans et sa mère, Joan, avait 62 ans. Elle a épousé John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London le 15 février 1430, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 10 filles. Elle est décédée en 1444, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 28 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Knolleys 1416 in London, Sumner, Kansas, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Knollys Lord Mayor of London 66 und ihre Mutter Joan 62. Sie hat am 15. Februar 1430 in London, Middlesex, England John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 10 Töchter. Sie starb 1444 im Alter von 28 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.London, London, England: London, Sumner, Kansas, Stati Uniti d'America
it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Knolleys è nata il nel 1416 nel London, Sumner, Kansas, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, Thomas Knollys Lord Mayor of London, aveva 66 anni e sua madre, Joan, aveva 62 anni. Lei sposato John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London il 15 febbraio 1430, nel London, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 10 figlie. Morì nel 1444, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 28 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Knolleysが1416年にアメリカ合衆国カンザス州スムナーロンドンで生まれた時，父Thomas Knollys Lord Mayor of Londonは66歳，母Joanは62歳であった。1430年2月15日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンでJohn Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of Londonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と10人の娘の親であった。彼女は1444年に故郷で28歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Knolleys(이)가 1416년 미국 캔자스 주 섬너 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Knollys Lord Mayor of London(은)는 66세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan(은)는 62세였다. 그녀는 1430년 2월 15일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1444년 그녀의 고향에서 28세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.London, London, England: London, Sumner, Cansas, Estados Unidos da América
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Knolleys nasceu em 1416, em London, Sumner, Cansas, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Thomas Knollys Lord Mayor of London, tinha 66 anos e sua mãe, Joan, tinha 62 anos. Ela casou-se com John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London em 15 de fevereiro de 1430, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 10 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1444, em sua cidade natal, com 28 anos.

ro.London, London, England: London, Sumner, Kansas, Statele Unite ale Americii

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Knolleys родилась в 1416 г. в местности лондон, сумнир, Канзас, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Thomas Knollys Lord Mayor of London было 66 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan, 62. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London 15 февраля 1430 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 10 дочерей. Она умерла в 1444 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 28 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Knolleys nació en 1416, en London, Sumner, Kansas, Estados Unidos, su papá, Thomas Knollys Lord Mayor of London, tenía 66 años y su mamá, Joan, tenía 62 años. Se casó con John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London el 15 de febrero de 1430, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 10 hijas. Murió en 1444, en su pueblo, a la edad de 28 años.
